## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Cross-compiles for all six release targets
- [ ] Updated `specs/aico.md` if behaviour changed
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing usage changed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and are atomic
